name: HMS Daniel Clowden (FY 531)
events: 27 Feb 1944 HMS United (Lt. N.R. Wood, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Plymouth together with HMS Tartar (Cdr. St. J.R.J. Tyrwhitt, DSC, RN) and HMCS Huron (Lt.Cdr. H.S. Rayner, DSC, RCN).
HMS United was escorted from Plymouth to the exercise area by Notre Dame de France (A/Skr.Lt. J. Coxall, RNR).
On completion of the exercises HMS United was escorted back to Plymouth by HMS Daniel Clowden (T/Skr. J.S. Cobby, RNR). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
